name: MetaTrader 5
description: Trade through MetaTrader 5 — risk-sized market orders, position management, and account info. Bring your own MT5 terminal.

fields.label: Python interpreter (path to a python3 with the MetaTrader5 package installed)
MT5 terminal path (optional — leave blank to use the default install)
MT5 account number (optional — leave blank if the terminal is already logged in)
MT5 password (only needed if login is set)
MT5 broker server (only needed if login is set)

storage.label: Default symbol
storage.description: Symbol used when a quick command doesn't specify one (e.g. EURUSD).

storage.label: Default risk percent
storage.description: Account % to risk per trade when a prompt doesn't specify.

quick_commands.description: Show MT5 account balance, equity, and margin.
List open positions on the default symbol.
Dry-run a 1:2 buy on the default symbol at 10 pip SL, default risk %.
